kirundi.handwaver_inspired_build_by_stretching: Byatewe inkunga na HandWaver: ubaka unyuze mu kurambura akadomo → umurongo → urwego → ikintu gikomeye
kirundi.click_ai_tutor_or_press_to_get_insight: Kanda "Umwarimu AI" cyangwa ukande / kugira ngo ubone ubushishozi ku miterere iriho.
kirundi.build_geometry_by_stretching_a_point_i: Ubaka jeyometri unyuze mu kurambura akadomo kuba umurongo, umurongo kuba urwego, n'urwego kuba ikintu gikomeye. Buri kurambura kongeraho ikintu gishya ku gice.
kirundi.mostly_points_stretch_any_to_begin_bui: Ahanini utudomo — rambura ako ari ko kose kugira ngo utangire kubaka uduce tw'umurongo.
kirundi.line_segments_dominate_stretching_them: Uduce tw'umurongo niho dukomeye. Kudurambura mu buryo buhagaze butanga inzego.
kirundi.rectangles_dominate_stretch_perpendicu: Kare nibyo bikomeye. Rambura mu buryo buhagaze ku rwego kugira ngo usohore prism.
kirundi.solids_dominate_each_prism_has_interio: Ibintu bikomeye niho bikomeye. Buri prism ifite ingano y'imbere n'imbibi z'ubuso.
kirundi.predict_geometry_properties_as_you_str: Hanura ibiranga jeyometri mu gihe urambura. Nta rufunguzo rw'ibisubizo — wowe ushyiraho urumenyo rwawe.
kirundi.your_hypothesis_what_stretches_grow_le: Igitekerezo cyawe (ni ukurambura kuhe gukura uburebure vuba — ubuso vuba — ingano vuba?)
kirundi.e_g_stretching_a_segment_perpendicular: urugero, kurambura igice mu buryo buhagaze kongera ubuso kabiri ariko ingano isaba kurambura kwa kabiri...
kirundi.when_you_stretch_a_segment_perpendicul: Iyo urambuye igice mu buryo buhagaze kuri cyo ubwacyo, ni iki kibaho ku mubare w'ingero zacyo?
kirundi.if_centroid_shifts_after_a_stretch_wha: Niba hagati yimuka nyuma yo kurambura, werekeje he kurambura cyane?
kirundi.how_does_total_volume_change_vs_total_: Ni gute ingano yose ihinduka ugereranyije n'ubuso bwose iyo urambuye umurongo umwe inshuro ebyiri?
kirundi.what_would_make_this_construction_symm: Ni iki cyatuma iri yubakwa rireshya kuruhande rwa hagati yaryo?
kirundi.i_can_explain_why_these_metrics_scale_: Nshobora gusobanura impamvu izi ngero zigereranya gutya mu gihe ndambura.
kirundi.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget y'ubushakashatsi — nta manota, nta guhishura, nta gusuka ibisubizo.
kirundi.euler_s_polyhedron_formula_for_any_con: Formula ya polyhedron ya Euler: kuri buri polyhedron iboneye, V − E + F = 2
kirundi.alloflow_requires_hardware_acceleratio: AlloFlow isaba ihutisha rya hardware kugira ngo yerekane amashusho 3D. Nyamuneka shyiraho WebGL mu igenamiterere ya mushakisha yawe kugira ngo ukorane n'iri shuri.
kirundi.interactive_geometry_sandbox_3d_visual: Iyerekana rya 3D ry'agasanduku ka jeyometri gikorana
kirundi.drag_rotate_scroll_zoom_right_click_pa: 🖱️ Kurura: zenguruka • Manura: rambura • Kanda-iburyo: imura
kirundi.tip_your_answer_must_be_within_5_of_th: 💡 Inama: Igisubizo cyawe kigomba kuba mu 5% by'agaciro nyako. Koresha π ≈ 3.14159
kirundi.stl_files_are_unit_less_most_3d_printe: 💡 Dosiye za STL nta gipimo zifite. Abenshi mu ba slicer ba printer 3D (Cura, PrusaSlicer) bakoresha milimetero ku buryo busanzwe. Imiterere ifite ubugari=5 izacapwa ubugari bwa 5mm.
